citation_discipline.detail: All 5 primary resources cited at least once. Footnote-style inline markers with bibliography in References.

sequence_drift.detail: No comparison operators (==, !=, >=, <=, <, >) in runnable code. No if/else, no user input(), no lists — all correctly deferred to 11.5+. All concepts are either from 11.1–11.3 (variable, assignment, types, type()) or this topic's corpus.

beginner_readability.detail: Terms defined on first use. Concrete code examples before abstraction. Tables for arithmetic operators and type conversion. No jargon dumps. Paragraphs ≤4 sentences throughout.

scope.detail: Nothing taught beyond the topic headline. float precision, bool operators, type conversion all on-headline. Comparisons (11.5), if/else (11.5), user input (11.5) named-and-deferred only.

corpus_faithfulness.detail: All claims traceable to corpus sections. Reading is a condensed curated pass — no new content introduced.

verdict: PASS (cycle 1). All checks green. 1330 words, 7 min, standard profile. All 5 primary resources cited. No forward references in active code. Beginner readability strong. No scope creep.
